name: Lieselotte Sherlock
alt_names: リーゼロッテ・シャルロック
description: Lieselotte is a beautiful young lady, who has flowing, long blonde hair that is tied up in twin tail. She has purple eyes compared to her sister who has blue eyes. She is also very voluptuous. Her main attire consists of thigh boots, opera gloves, shorts, and a cape-like dress that leaves her midriff open that is held by two strings attached to her choker.
